prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流 建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第58名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，属中上层次211；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出 轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第69、评价一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；地理学A、教育学A、马克思主 义理论A等，与物理类招生专业（地理科学类、数学类、物理学师范等）有较好对应，师范类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化等物理类热门专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总人数约15.4万，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增加约32%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约11.2万（较2025年8.4万增 约34%），竞争显著加剧；南京师范大学位于江苏南京，属跨省招生，在本区招生计划占比较小（近年约36–38人），地域 偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势表现、2026年招生计划持平及本区考生总数大幅增加（约34%），考生规模扩张带来的竞争压力是主要推 动因素；负面声誉可能抑制部分热度，但计算机、电子信息等热门专业的高热度对物理类考生有较强吸引力。在2025年基准5890名基础上，预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约59 20名，区间5420–6420名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 8646 → 10408 → 15879 → 17201 → 5890. In 2023–2024, the ranking significantly dropped (about 15,000–17,000), but in 2025 it sharply moved forward to 5890, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is about 5890. The local enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 38, 38, 36, 36, 37 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 37, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 58th, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean was dismissed for extramarital affairs, and the Rising Sun Flag was mistakenly hung), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 69th with average reviews, and short video platform exposure is not high. It has A-level disciplines in Geography, Education, and Marxist Theory, which correspond well with physics category majors (Geography Science, Mathematics, Physics Teacher Training, etc.), with strong teacher training disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular physics category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended by society. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in this province is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (about 116,000). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that physics category examinees are about 112,000 (an increase of about 34% from 84,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and is a cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment plan in this region is relatively small (about 36–38 people in recent years), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the sharp forward movement in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of examinees in this region (about 34%), the competitive pressure from the expansion of the examinee pool is the main driving factor. Negative reputation may suppress some enthusiasm, but the high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information strongly attracts physics category candidates. Based on the 2025 baseline of 5890, the ranking is expected to slightly move backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5920, with a range of 5420–6420.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5420), you can focus on sprinting for top popular majors like Computer Science and Technology.
